title: ECR
description: ECR documents overview material for ECR in the infrastructure domain. The page highlights Registry, Replication, From, and To, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include infrastructure, and container, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts.
